articles.author: Eric Berger
articles.title: We managed to glean some interesting details about the Artemis III mission - Ars Technica
articles.description: I was on the phone with Blue Origin leadership that night, all the next day, all through the weekend."

articles.author: Kyle Orland
articles.title: Valve kills its retail gift card program due to scammers - Ars Technica
articles.description: Move also cuts off a massive market of legit users who buy cards with physical cash.
